projects.name: Gaurav Bansal (KU-1225Avondale)
projects.problems_text: 16 planning tasks are still overdue (1-4 days), most unassigned. Planning team meeting, distribution plans, structural plans, and energy report have no one working on them. Romina has 3 overdue material list tasks. CALL 811 is 4 days late and blocking the 811 Inspection due tomorrow. 9 construction tasks are blocked downstream — none can start until the planning backlog clears.
projects.risk_text: 811 INSPECTION is due tomorrow but blocked by overdue CALL 811. Set of architectural final plans is also due tomorrow with nobody assigned. 5 tasks due in the next 48h are either unassigned or blocked. If the planning backlog isn't cleared this week, the entire foundation sequence will slip.

projects.name: Sergio Lares (212129)
projects.problems_text: 8 tasks still overdue. Milagros has 4 overdue CompanyCam and inspection tasks (1-4 days). DEMO FINAL SIGN-OFF is 3 days late with nobody assigned. 15 tasks remain blocked — plumbing trim, electrical trim, countertops, appliances, and cleaning all waiting on unstarted schedule tasks. Nobody is assigned to CABINETS INSTALLATION.
projects.risk_text: TAKE MEASUREMENTS FOR COUNTERTOPS is due Mar 26 but blocked by re SCHEDULE CREW. CABINETS INSTALLATION is due tomorrow with no assignee. If scheduling tasks aren't completed this week, the entire finish-out sequence (plumbing → electrical → countertops → appliances → cleaning → delivery) stays frozen.

projects.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
projects.problems_text: 5 blocked tasks. Spray foam installation is waiting on Leland to install new windows. That's holding up plumbing rough-in, electrical rough-in, and HVAC ductwork in sequence. Jeff is the only person assigned to any of these.
projects.risk_text: Erect Metal Framing and Interior Framing are both due Thursday with nobody assigned. Schedule framing (Jeff) is also due Thursday. If framing wraps up but insulation can't start because of the window dependency, the whole interior sequence stalls.
